text: Standard structural and operational precautions to prevent accidental oil pollution on a vessel include:

options.text: Executing transfer and discharge of oil cargo strictly as per the vessel's manuals
Regular visual inspections of oil pipelines, associated valves, and manifold structures
Regular training of the crew via oil pollution response and SOPEP drills

explanation: A comprehensive approach to pollution prevention includes procedural compliance, proactive maintenance of transfer infrastructure, and the continuous drilling of the crew in SOPEP (Shipboard Oil Pollution Emergency Plan) to ensure a rapid, correct response.
